title: Bewitched Delight
description: Cozy Fabric modpack blending witchcraft, farming, cooking, and create automation in an enhanced survival world
body:
Bewitchment + Farmers delight and a little create. plus a whole lotta other mods to make the world more lively and more dangerous to survive in. 

theres also bosses to fight and castles to take over

Mods retain their own licenses
